mission_templates.title: Extraction: Neon Witness
mission_templates.objective_text: Extract a clinic witness from the east-rail blackout before gangs sell them to Aegis auditors.

possible_complications.name: Media Leak
possible_complications.trigger_text: A pirate news relay leaks the team's route before extraction.

tags.name: media_leak
tags.description: Leaked footage turns tactical choices into public evidence.

consequence.narrative_text: Media leak: pirate feeds turn the firefight into a public scandal.

possible_complications.name: Civilian Panic
possible_complications.trigger_text: Crowds panic as muzzle flashes bounce across the stacked market decks.

tags.name: civilian_panic
tags.description: Noncombatants scatter, block exits, and amplify district unrest.

consequence.narrative_text: Civilian panic: frightened residents jam streets and blame Aegis patrols.
